scheme: MSbar running quark masses at M_Z in SM convention
source_note: Common-scale M_Z values are taken from a published table of running fermion masses used for SM renormalization-group studies. The table cites Xing, Zhang, and Zhou, Phys. Rev. D 77, 113016 (2008), arXiv:0712.1419, for updated running quark and lepton masses.
source_citation_text: A. Abdalgabar, A. S. Cornell, A. Deandrea, and A. Tarhini, Eur. Phys. J. C 74, 2893 (2014), Sec. 2.1, quoting Z.-z. Xing, H. Zhang, and S. Zhou, Phys. Rev. D 77, 113016 (2008), arXiv:0712.1419.
precision_limitations: This file supplies a common-scale MSbar reference table for audit use.
It does not implement a new BHSM running calculation.
Uncertainties are not included in the cited table excerpt used here; uncertainty fields are therefore null.
The resulting comparison is a scheme-aware screen, not a claim of precision QCD closure.
